title: Upon Meg.
content:
Meg yesterday was troubled with a pose,
    Which, this night harden'd, sodders up her nose.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Meg.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
